title: Open Banking & Payments Roundtable
description_short: Curated roundtable on open banking APIs, PSD3, and the next wave of payments infrastructure in the Nordics. Invite only for Copenhagen Fintech members.

title: Retail Tech Denmark — AI in Customer Experience
description_short: How Danish retailers are reshaping customer experience with AI. Keynotes from Matas, Bilka, Magasin. Panel on e-commerce conversion and mobile app UX.
keywords_match: AI, UX, customer experience, e-com, e-commerce, mobile app, retail

title: E-commerce Denmark 2026 — Conversion & UX Summit
description_short: Denmark's largest e-commerce conference. 40+ speakers on conversion optimization, mobile commerce, UX research for checkout flows, and the state of Nordic e-commerce.

title: Nordic Fintech Week 2026
description_short: The largest fintech conference in the Nordics. Connect with founders, investors, banks, and corporates across open banking, payments, AI in finance, and more.
keywords_match: AI, banking, fintech, open banking, payments

title: Demo Day: Digital Assets
description_short: Demo day focused on digital assets, crypto, and blockchain fintechs from the Nordic region. Open banking and payments innovations on display.
keywords_match: AI, banking, fintech, open banking, payments

title: Nordic Insurance Innovation Forum
description_short: Forum for insurance executives and innovation leads. Sessions on AI claims processing, digital-first insurance products, and mobile self-care apps. Tryg, Topdanmark, Codan.

title: App Store Optimization Workshop
description_short: Interactive online workshop covering ASO fundamentals, keyword research for Nordic markets, and A/B testing store listings for iOS and Android apps.
keywords_match: ASO, Android, app store optimization, iOS

title: Copenhagen Mobile Meetup #38
description_short: Monthly meetup for iOS and Android developers. Talks on Kotlin Multiplatform, SwiftUI, and scaling mobile teams. Free pizza and beer.
keywords_match: Android, UI, iOS, kotlin multiplatform, multiplatform

title: Design Systems Copenhagen
description_short: Half-day summit for design system leads. Sessions on tokenization, design-to-code pipelines, and governance models at scale.

title: Scaleup Masterclass: German-Market-Entry workshop. Stockholm edit.
description_short: Stockholm edit. Workshop for Nordic fintechs entering Germany: strategy, expert talks, and group work. Hosted by Copenhagen Fintech.

title: Copenhagen Blockchain Collective
description_short: Monthly community event on web3, DeFi protocols, and NFT marketplaces. Focused on developer tooling and smart contract security.

title: Quantum Computing in Finance - Quantum as a Component, not a Replacement
description_short: Join and get a clear and realistic understanding of where quantum stands today and what it could mean for financial organisations.
